programImpact.label: Inspire or improve economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship policies and/or national strategies
Influence or strengthen economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship strategies, initiatives, and projects

Expand your regional and international network of high-level decision-makers to advance your projects, enhance your events and or better position your company or institution in the Americas and beyond
Enhance your skills in economic development, innovation and entrepreneurship to further support the national or subnational economic development agenda
Learn about economic development best practices that can be replicated in your institution, your country and/or region
Better position your company or institution in the Americas and beyond
Learn about business soft-landing opportunities in Illinois, U.S, and/or in other countries

qualitativeQuotes.name: John Achoukian
qualitativeQuotes.text: The Armenian delegation expressed strong interest in connecting with Illinois-based experts to explore entry into the Illinois and broader U.S. wine market, potentially through an introduction to companies like Breakthru Beverage Group in Chicago. Armenia’s rapidly growing and scaled winemaking industry, combined with reduced tariff emphasis, presents a compelling win-win opportunity: Illinois-based importers and distributors could gain access to high-quality, distinctive wines, while Armenian producers would benefit from expanded U.S. market access and visibility.
